description: Clear, low-compression delivery with controlled pitch and strong sentence-terminal inflection to maximize auditory intelligibility. Extended pauses between sentences provide processing time and reduce signal overlap. Emphasis on key terms supports partial-hearing comprehension. Designed for deaf and hard-of-hearing users who use residual hearing or hearing-assisted devices.
intended_use: Deaf and hard-of-hearing users with residual hearing
Hearing-assisted device compatibility requiring clear signal separation
Voice systems paired with captioning where pacing aids synchronization
Environments where auditory intelligibility is critical
